rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to Fam. Code §54.041, which governs juvenile court orders affecting parents and restitution. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 54.041. ORDERS AFFECTING PARENTS AND OTHERS.
_note: Rule text concerns juvenile delinquency proceedings and restitution; no nexus to property tax homestead exemptions.
